macro.title: Driver on N.J. Turnpike hurt as United plane hits pole on approach to Newark airport - NBC News
macro.summary: A United Airlines plane hit a light pole during its final approach to Newark Liberty International Airport, injuring a driver on the New Jersey Turnpike and causing damage to the aircraft, officials said Sunday

macro.title: How Chinese carmaker Geely put roots in the U.S. - CNBC
macro.summary: Chinese company Zhejiang Geely Holding Group has big investments in three automakers already doing business in the U.S.

macro.title: Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy pill head start forces investors to rethink Eli Lilly's GLP-1 dominance - CNBC
macro.summary: Early signs from the launch of Novo Nordisk's Wegovy pill and Eli Lilly & Co.'s Foundayo are making investors rethink the opportunity for GLP-1 pills.
